creator: skye@ffwd.cx
text:
Install an "ASound Express 32-bit PnP" PCI sound card, with the ALS4000 chipset.  The sound is extremely harsh and "clipped" and there's a loud hissing sound too.  Tried adjusting all levels, moving the card, etc to no avail.

> cat /dev/sndstat
FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm) Nov 21 2001 10:02:21
Installed devices:
pcm0: <Avance Logic ALS4000> at io 0xdc00 irq 11 (1p/1r/0v channels duplex)
